contactSection.title: Ready to Transform Your IT?
contactSection.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We respond within 24 hours with a clear, actionable plan.

servicesSection.title: Our Core Services
servicesSection.subtitle: From network cabling to AI-powered infrastructure — comprehensive IT solutions tailored to your business needs.

services.title: Network Cabling Solutions
services.description: Full-scale network infrastructure design and installation, built to be efficient, clean, and perfectly suited to your firm's requirements.
items: CAT5e, CAT6, CAT6A & CAT6+ copper cabling

services.title: Network Infrastructure
services.description: Powerful network management for small to midsize businesses. We manage and monitor all your IT systems — no interruptions, no congestion, no downtime.

services.title: CCTV Systems
services.description: Best-in-class security camera systems with remote monitoring. Analog & IP technology deployed to your exact specifications — protect what matters most.

services.title: Entry & Access Systems
services.description: Comprehensive entry and access management solutions for commercial and residential properties — combining smart door access control with modern intercom and door phone systems.
items: Monitoring software to eliminate human error

services.title: Software Solutions
services.description: Custom software development tailored to your business processes — from enterprise applications to lightweight automation tools that save time and reduce cost.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Professional, high-performance websites and web applications designed to represent your brand online and convert visitors into loyal customers.

services.title: Email Solutions
services.description: Reliable, professional email infrastructure for your business — hosted, managed, and secured so your team communicates without interruption.

services.title: Cloud Solutions
services.description: Scalable, secure cloud infrastructure that grows with your business. We plan, migrate, and manage your cloud environment from start to finish.

services.title: Cybersecurity Solutions
services.description: Protect your business from evolving cyber threats with comprehensive security services — from firewall management to full vulnerability assessments and compliance support.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Custom iOS and Android mobile applications built for performance and user experience — from concept and design through to launch and ongoing support.

services.title: IT Consultancy
services.description: Strategic IT guidance to help your business make the right technology decisions. From technology audits to digital transformation roadmaps — we are your trusted technology advisor.

projectsSection.title: Successfully Delivered Projects
projectsSection.subtitle: Real platforms we built for growing businesses — from fleet operations to full e-commerce management, designed to save time and drive revenue.

projects.name: FleetDesk
projects.tagline: Run your entire rental shop from one smart dashboard
projects.description: FleetDesk is a complete online car rental management platform that gives shop owners full control over their fleet, bookings, finances, and team — without spreadsheets or guesswork.
highlights: Manage every vehicle and see available days at a glance
Revenue, expenses, and profit analytics in real time
Employee management and office expense tracking
Live rental tracking with service alerts and notifications

screens.label: Analytics Dashboard
screens.alt: FleetDesk analytics dashboard showing revenue, bookings, and fleet utilization

projects.name: Fasa Products
projects.tagline: Live e-commerce store with a powerful admin back office
projects.description: A full online business platform built for Fasa Products — a customer-facing storefront at fasafoods.com paired with an admin system to manage orders, inventory, and sales insights in one place.
highlights: Live storefront at fasafoods.com with product catalog and special offers
Unified orders dashboard for pending, processing, and delivered orders
Best-selling product insights tracked by period

screens.label: Online Store
screens.alt: Fasa Products e-commerce website at fasafoods.com showing product catalog and special offers

screens.label: Orders Dashboard
screens.alt: Fasa Products orders management dashboard with order tracking and status updates

supportSection.title: World-Class IT Support
supportSection.subtitle: AnyTech understands how critical your IT systems are. We pride ourselves on always-available, best-in-class helpdesk and onsite support.

features.title: Help Desk Support
features.description: Continuous service ensuring your critical IT systems and applications are always up and running. Problems resolved quickly by knowledgeable technicians.
items: Remote support for email, servers, PCs & networks

features.title: Onsite Support
features.description: When remote support isn't enough, AnyTech's onsite team is always available to bring your network back online with a fully managed, hands-on approach.
items: Seasonal Onsite IT Support for peak periods

features.title: Preventative Maintenance & Updates
features.description: Proactive monitoring and scheduled maintenance so you never face unexpected downtime or system failures.

card.title:
Always Available.
Always Reliable.
card.description: Our dedicated support team is standing by around the clock to ensure your business never skips a beat.

hero.title: Your Dream Is
hero.description: AnyTech Solution delivers innovative IT, networking, and hardware solutions at affordable prices — building reliable technology that drives your business forward across the globe.
hero.taglineQuote: "To become a leading IT solutions facilitator in the global marketplace"

visionSection.title: Vision, Mission & Values
visionSection.subtitle: We exist to enhance business growth through technology solutions that create real, lasting competitive advantage.

cards.title: Our Vision
cards.description: To become a leading IT solutions facilitator in the global marketplace through providing well-reliable and quality service.

cards.title: Our Mission
cards.description: To serve our customers with the best innovative IT solutions at affordable prices, while keeping a healthy and long-term relationship with them.

cards.title: Our Commitment
cards.description: To enhance business growth through technology, network, and hardware solutions that deliver market-defining quality and reliable competitive advantage to customers around the globe.
